_inspectorSnowReport.Report: Tuesday March 03 5:05 a.m. Spring storms are on the way. We picked up 7 inches overnight and there are more snowflakes coming. With the new snow and recent spring style weather, our mountain operations team will need to perform avalanche mitigation. As a result, delays are possible as we work to open terrain. March is our snowiest month and historically brings deep powder and floaty turns. Today we will see a lull as the snowfall and clouds fade out. There’s plenty to explore with over 60 open trails and nearly 30 groomed runs. Take a lap of Eagle Express in the morning for some great carving. Head over to The Thirsty Squirrel for some groovy vibes from 11:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m. Buy a $20 white logo shirt at The Thirsty Squirrel and get the materials and instructions to tie dye your own unique Squirrel shirt. Each day that you ski and ride at Solitude is one step closer to a chance to win a free 26/27 Ikon Pass. We are giving away giving away ten 26/27 Ikon Passes and thousands of prizes in the Solidaze Rewards Challenge so don’t forget to swing by the ticket office to claim your prizes!

_inspectorSnowReport.Alert: 7 inches of new snow since lifts closed!
